intro: In a few minutes, we will inform the best-supported treatments based on available evidence for people with a similar profile.
resultsSubheading: These are the best-supported treatment matches based on your measured profile.
resultsNote: Delivery format and provider options can be refined in later steps.
crisisIntro: This app cannot safely continue matching treatments at this stage.
crisisBestNextStep: The best next step is to contact a trained professional or crisis service now.
crisisEmergency: If you or someone else may be in immediate danger, call your local emergency number now.
crisisCountryChooserLabel: Choose your country or nearest option
questionnaireSavedNotice: Progress saved on this device. You can resume from where you left off.
